reasoning: The echo_flower_idle_v02 (summon category) renders at approximately 70-90px tall in the scene view. Comparing to the floor tile grid (tiles appear ~40-48px rendered, implying ~2x world scale), the character occupies roughly 1.5-2 tiles height, placing it at or near full player scale (32px world units). Summons should be 50-80% of player = 16-26px world units. The fairy sprite is visually prominent — closer to player-sized than summon-sized. Perspective is acceptable for the art style (frontal pixel art in a top-down scene is common). No overlap or effect clutter issues. Toy diorama feel is borderline: the character reads as a main actor rather than a supporting summon. Not a hard fail since the excess is modest and could reflect intended visual hierarchy, but size reduction of ~25-30% is recommended to firmly land in the 50-80% summon range.
